title: eriogonum dasyanthemum
intro: Eriogonum dasyanthemum, also known as desert buckwheat, is a shrubby perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Its medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Eriogonum dasyanthemum can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
